items.claim: All of Tommy McMillan's finish wins occur in the first round.
items.quote: All of his finish wins come in the first round.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan's fighting style is aggressive and avoids point fighting.
items.quote: this guy's getting after it. He's not going to go out there and point fight.

items.claim: If there is a grappling exchange, McMillan is vulnerable to being submitted.
items.quote: if there's a grappling exchange at any point in this fight, and McMillan makes even one mistake, you know, his neck is getting snatched up.

items.claim: Fatim Klein is superior to Tabitha Reachi in the striking department.
items.quote: I think she styles on Reachi here on the feet.

items.claim: Chase Hooper missed weight for his upcoming fight.
items.quote: Chase Hooper did miss weight today.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is highly hittable and lacks a strong chin.
items.quote: Chase Hooper is very hitable. He's very chinny.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is 42 years old, which is advanced for the middleweight division.
items.quote: Caner is 42 years old. I mean, that's at at middleweight, it's it's really getting up there.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier has been hurt, dropped, or finished in four of his last five fights.
items.quote: he's been hurt, dropped, wobbled, knocked out, or one of one of the the four in his last five fights

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan is highly effective at finishing opponents once he hurts them.
items.quote: if Duncan hurts you, he's going to finish you. He's going to, you know, not really let you off the hook.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman has significant, long-term knee issues that affect his mobility.
items.quote: the knees have been going bad and he was been talking about his knees for the last 5 years and I'm watching some of the clips this week and it looks like he can barely walk.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman has not competed in approximately one year.
items.quote: He has not fought in about a year.
